name: 2026 observations
description: Consolidated raw CGM data for 2026. Each day has its own annotation in the days[] array. Readings are deduplicated across source files. Times are UTC; timezoneOffsetMinutes applies at inspection time to convert to local.

days.notes: Pre-monitoring context: dinner ~18g at ~18:30, evening injection ~18:00. Recording started 19:10 with BG at 4.7. Rose to 8.8 by 20:00 (dinner settling). Bedtime snack ~22:15 BST (milk + banana ~20g fast carbs + toast with peanut butter) peaked 10.3 at 23:00 BST. Insulin consumed it in 40 min. Toast eaten too late to absorb before intermediate insulin peak — demonstrates fast carbs failing against overnight intermediate insulin peak.

Hypo 3.9 at 01:10 BST. Three JB rescues through the night 00:00-05:00 BST — each spiked briefly then crashed. Toast 20g around 05:00 BST brought BG to 10.1 by 06:30 BST. Food diary (BST): 07:30 injection, 07:52 porridge ~15g. 12:10 3 JBs + lentil soup ~25g total. 15:00 biscuit 10g. 15:51 small orange + yoghurt ~5g. 16:30 (corrected from 17:00) 10g snack. 18:00-19:00 glass of wine. 18:30 dinner ~20g. 21:00 4 crackers + cheese + PB ~20g. 22:30 biscuit 10g + another 10g. Overnight: 3 JB rescues (~15g each at ~01:50, ~03:00, ~05:00) + toast 20g at ~05:00. Observations: morning insulin consistently overshoots meals. Afternoon is constant grazing to stay above 6.0. Crackers at 21:00 give clean calibration: 20g from 5.7 peaked 10.7 = 4.0g/mmol.

Hypo 4.3 at 06:00-06:10 BST. Dawn spike through 9.1 by 06:50 BST. Porridge breakfast ~06:52 (15g carbs est), peaked 16.9 at 09:00 BST. Morning insulin brings it down to 8.0 by 11:30 BST. Lunch spike to 13.9 at 14:20 BST, then steady descent. Pre-dinner drop to 6.8 at 17:20 BST. Dinner spike to 10.8 at 18:50 BST. Bedtime window: 7.4-9.3 BST. Overnight: gradual fall from 8.6 to hypo 4.9 at 02:10 BST, rescue carbs pushed to 10.8 by 04:00 BST, then settled 8-9 range.

Overnight from 8th: gradual fall to hypo 4.9 at 02:10 BST, rescue carbs pushed to 10.8 by 04:00 BST, settled 8-9 range. Dawn rise from 8.2 to 9.2 by 07:40 BST. Breakfast window 08:00-08:20 BST: BG 8.7-8.5. Post-breakfast spike to 16.8 at 10:40-11:00 BST. Slow descent through afternoon, 13-12 range. Pre-dinner dip to 6.9 at 18:50 BST (bug: engine double-nudged 7.4 → 6.9 same dip, she ate 15g fast sugar total, spiked to 10.9). Dinner ~20:00 BST. Evening insulin 19:00 BST. Bedtime starchy carbs: 15g porridge 21:30 + 10g toast 22:30 (staggered, slow-release). Overnight to 10th: gentle fall from 8.2 at 01:00 BST to hypo 4.9 at 03:00 BST, rescue carbs (~25g JBs+toast) spiked to 11.1 by 04:00 BST, stable 7.7-8.2 through to dawn

Dawn range 7.4-8.1. Morning insulin 07:30 (06:30 UTC, 12u). Breakfast peak 11.3 at 09:00. Mid-morning lows: 10:30 @ 6.9, 11:40 @ 6.2, 12:50 @ 6.9, 13:10 @ 6.2, each followed by small snack bounces. Lunch peak 11.3 at 14:10. Afternoon plateau 9.5-10.4 (2h). Late afternoon descent ~10 → 5.9 at 17:50. Container restart 17:53. Engine reactive nudge fired 18:10 at 5.8, recommended 5g fast + 10g starchy; user acted on it; BG 5.8 → 10.4 over 30 min. Evening insulin 19:00 (18:00 UTC, 9u). Dinner 19:00: steak + asparagus, zero carbs. Self-reported post-dinner carb intake (user's own timing, all BST): 20:00 cheese/crackers 10g (mod) | 20:15 toast 10g (mod) | 20:30 2 JBs 10g (fast) | sometime 21:00-22:00 2 tbsp porridge 12g (slow, time uncertain) | 22:30 pancake 15g (mod starch). Total ~57g. Post-injection BG trajectory (BST): 19:00 10.4 → 19:30 9.1 → 20:00 6.6 → 20:20 6.6 → 20:30 5.1 → 20:50 7.7 → 21:10 10.2 → 21:30 11.1 → 22:00 10.4 → 22:30 10.8 → 23:22 15.3 (irregular scan reading) → 23:30 14.6. Overnight descent begins from 14.7 at 00:00. See 04-11 notes for continuation.

Overnight trajectory from 00:00: 14.7 → 01:00 12.6 → 02:00 10.1 → 03:00 9.7 → 04:00 8.2 → 05:00 7.7 → 06:00 6.6 → 06:50 5.2 (low). Gap in readings 07:10-07:30. 07:30 reading 11.3. Morning insulin 07:30 (06:30 UTC, 12u). Post-07:30 descent: 11.3 → 11.6 → 10.3 → 9.8 → 8.7 → 8.1 → 7.7 → 7.1 → 6.4 at 08:30. Stabilises 7.9-9.4 through mid-morning. 11:10 dip to 6.7, rises to 11.6 at 11:50. Holds 8.4-10.7 through 12:40 (tail of current dataset). Carb intake for overnight and morning TBD — user to share.
